default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content quality needs improvement; focus shifting to refreshing existing articles and optimizing for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [New AI-powered workflows being implemented to enhance content quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Integration pages identified as a potential area for new content development](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Performance metrics show growth in impressions (104k) and clicks (44% increase), with 19-20 articles published](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Adjustment

  - [Shift focus from new content to refreshing existing articles (10/week)](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Prioritize less technical articles for V5 updates](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Reduce new content production to improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=575.0)
  - [Explore creating content for integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)

### Quality Improvement Initiatives

  - [New AI workflows being implemented next week](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Incorporates external sources and competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Includes obligatory internal and external links for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [CMS workflow improvements](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
      - [New tags: "Ready to Review", "Content Review", "Metadata Review"](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [Streamlined process for feedback and revisions within Strapi CMS](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [104,000 impressions (up from 2,600)](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [44% increase in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [19-20 articles published and indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [11 drafts ready, 9 more to be uploaded this week](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### SEO Optimization

  - [Need to optimize meta tags, descriptions, and titles](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Character limits: 160 for meta descriptions, 60-65 for meta titles](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Focus on cross-linking and SEO optimization for existing content](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)

### AI Content Generation Improvements

  - [Current system uses Perplexity AI to scan SERPs for relevant, up-to-date information](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Exploring integration with Strapi's Capa AI models for more accurate content generation](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Aiming to increase AI-generated content quality from 50% to 70-90% in future versions](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)

### Upcoming Events

  - [Knowledge transfer calls scheduled for October 8th and 22nd](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Separate call scheduled for webinar planning](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement new AI workflows for content creation starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Double the number of article refreshes per week](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Schedule a call to discuss integration pages content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Explore integration of Strapi's Capa AI models into content generation process](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1199.0)
  - [Continue optimizing existing content for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [Proceed with scheduled knowledge transfer calls and webinar planning](https://fathom.video/share/evu3_x7r4bQZPMVq48B3iTZDJyVyzf7P?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)

action_items.description: Review integration pages doc shared by Golzar. Schedule prep call w/ Victor re integration pages content
